title: Comparison against x and z leads to verilator crash

features.name: case inequality operator with x or z literal
features.description: Code should include a case inequality operator (!==) comparing a signal against 1'bx or 1'bz literal

features.name: clocked always block with non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block with non-blocking assignment inside a conditional statement
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (clk !== 1'bx) out <= ~out; end

features.name: output register port
features.description: Code should include an output port declared as a reg type
